title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Lendingkart Capital India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Lendingkart Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lendingkart Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Lendingkart Capital India:
Lendingkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart Capital India!
